<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>DIHS - Doctors Institute of Health Sciences, Sargodha</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  /* ── RESET & VARIABLES ── */
  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  :root {
    --navy:      #0b1f4a;
    --crimson:   #c0392b;
    --gold:      #f0c040;
    --blue:      #1a4a9a;
    --cream:     #f5f7fa;
    --white:     #ffffff;
    --light-gray:#eef1f7;
    --text-dark: #0b1f4a;
    --text-mid:  #3a4a6a;
    --text-light:#7a8aaa;
  }
  html, body { width: 100%; overflow-x: hidden; }
  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    background: var(--white);
  }

  /* ── NAVBAR ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    background: rgba(11,31,74,0.97);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold);
    padding: 0 2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    height: 70px; width: 100%;
  }
  .nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-logo-text { color: white; }
  .nav-logo-text .inst { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; }
  .nav-logo-text .sub  { font-size: 10px; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 0; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;
    text-decoration: none; padding: 0 14px; height: 70px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); border-bottom-color: var(--gold); }
  .nav-links .portal-btn {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy); border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 8px 18px; height: auto; margin-left: 16px; font-weight: 700;
    border-bottom: none !important;
  }
  .nav-links .portal-btn:hover { background: #ffd040; border-bottom: none !important; }
  .hamburger {
    display: none; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 5px;
    cursor: pointer; padding: 8px; border: none; background: none;
  }
  .hamburger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: white; border-radius: 2px; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .hamburger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform: rotate(45deg) translate(5px,5px); }
  .hamburger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; }
  .hamburger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform: rotate(-45deg) translate(5px,-5px); }
  .mobile-menu {
    display: none; position: fixed; top: 70px; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    background: rgba(11,31,74,0.98); z-index: 999; flex-direction: column;
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem; overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .mobile-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .mobile-menu a {
    color: white; text-decoration: none; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600;
    padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  }
  .mobile-menu a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
  .mobile-menu .mob-portal-btn {
    margin-top: 20px; background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px; border-bottom: none; justify-content: center;
  }

  /* ── TICKER ── */
  .ticker-wrap {
    margin-top: 70px; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; padding: 10px 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0b1f4a, #1a3a6e, #0b1f4a);
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold);
  }
  .ticker-inner { display: flex; gap: 60px; animation: ticker 30s linear infinite; white-space: nowrap; }
  .ticker-inner span { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--gold); }
  @keyframes ticker { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    min-height: calc(100vh - 70px);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end;
    background: #0b1f4a;
  }
  .hero-building-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; }
  .hero-bg-img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover; object-position: center 25%;
    display: block;
    filter: brightness(0.9) contrast(1.08) saturate(1.05);
  }
  .hero-bg-overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      rgba(11,31,74,0.15) 0%,
      rgba(11,31,74,0.40) 40%,
      rgba(11,31,74,0.82) 70%,
      rgba(9,18,50,0.97)  100%
    );
  }
  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    max-width: 1200px; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 4rem 2rem 4rem;
  }
  .hero-left { max-width: 680px; }

  /* ADMISSIONS OPEN BANNER */
  .admissions-open-banner {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(240,192,64,0.18), rgba(240,192,64,0.06));
    border: 2px solid var(--gold);
    border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px 22px;
    margin-bottom: 2rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(240,192,64,0.25);
    animation: bannerGlow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    cursor: pointer; max-width: 100%;
  }
  @keyframes bannerGlow {
    from { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(240,192,64,0.20); }
    to   { box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(240,192,64,0.55); }
  }
  .aob-pulse {
    position: absolute; top: -20px; right: -20px;
    width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(240,192,64,0.15);
    animation: pulseRing 2s ease-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulseRing { 0% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity:1; } 100% { transform: scale(2.2); opacity:0; } }
  .aob-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .aob-top { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .aob-year {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; line-height: 1;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(240,192,64,0.4);
  }
  .aob-intake { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin-top: 5px; }
  .aob-arrow {
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold);
    background: rgba(240,192,64,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(240,192,64,0.4);
    padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 10px; white-space: nowrap;
    animation: bounce2 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
    cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .aob-arrow:hover { background: rgba(240,192,64,0.35); }
  @keyframes bounce2 { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-5px); } }

  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 3.6rem); font-weight: 900;
    color: white; line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }
  .hero h1 span { color: var(--gold); }
  .hero p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 2rem; max-width: 520px; }
  .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 0; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy); padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px; transition: all 0.2s; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #ffd040; transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-outline {
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.45); color: white; padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px;
    transition: all 0.2s; background: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: white; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
  .hero-stats {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr);
    gap: 12px; margin-top: 2.5rem; max-width: 560px;
  }
  .hero-stat {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 8px; text-align: center;
  }
  .hero-stat .num { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; }
  .hero-stat .lbl { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); margin-top: 2px; }
  .scroll-hint {
    position: absolute; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    z-index: 3; animation: bounceScroll 2s infinite;
  }
  .scroll-hint::after { content: ''; width: 1px; height: 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); }
  @keyframes bounceScroll { 0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(6px)} }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section { padding: 5rem 2rem; }
  .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.2; }
  .section-sub { color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 580px; }
  .title-center { text-align: center; }
  .title-center .section-sub { margin: 0 auto; }

  /* ── PROGRAMS ── */
  .programs { background: var(--cream); }
  .programs-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap: 28px; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .program-card {
    background: white; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(11,31,74,0.08); transition: all 0.3s;
    border: 1px solid rgba(11,31,74,0.06); display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  }
  .program-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(11,31,74,0.14); }
  .prog-banner { height: 160px; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; padding: 1.2rem; overflow: hidden; }
  .prog-year-badge {
    position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    color: white; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px;
    padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px;
  }
  .prog-icon-wrap {
    width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .prog-icon-wrap svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; fill: white; }
  .prog-body { padding: 1.4rem; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .prog-abbr { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .prog-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display',serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .prog-desc { color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 0.87rem; line-height: 1.65; flex: 1; }
  .prog-meta { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .prog-tag { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; background: var(--light-gray); color: var(--text-mid); }
  .prog-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid var(--light-gray); }
  .prog-btn { flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; }
  .prog-btn-primary { background: var(--navy); color: white; }
  .prog-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--blue); }
  .prog-btn-outline { border: 1.5px solid var(--navy); color: var(--navy); }
  .prog-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--navy); color: white; }
  .banner-pharmd   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0b1f4a, #1a3a6e); }
  .banner-dpt      { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8e1a14, #c0392b); }
  .banner-pharm-tech{ background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a4a7a, #2471a3); }
  .banner-hnd      { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a5a20, #27ae60); }

  /* ── ADMISSIONS ADS ── */
  .admissions { background: white; }
  .ads-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(300px,1fr)); gap: 32px; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .ad-card { border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); transition: transform 0.3s; }
  .ad-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .ad-inner { padding: 0; position: relative; }
  .ad-header { padding: 24px 24px 20px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .ad-logo-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .ad-logo-box { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; }
  .ad-logo-box img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
  .ad-inst-name { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; }
  .ad-tagline { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .ad-main-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display',serif; font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: white; line-height: 1; }
  .ad-main-sub { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 4px; }
  .ad-body { background: white; padding: 20px 24px; }
  .ad-open-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .ad-open-badge .dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; animation: pulse 1.5s infinite; }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} }
  .ad-intake { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-mid); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .ad-features { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .ad-feat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-mid); }
  .ad-feat-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .ad-scholarships { margin: 12px 0; }
  .ad-sch-title { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .ad-sch-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
  .ad-sch-pill { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; }
  .ad-contact { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid var(--light-gray); flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
  .ad-contact-info { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-mid); }
  .ad-apply-btn { padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 7px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; }
  /* Ad card color themes */
  .ad-pharmd .ad-header    { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0b1f4a,#1a3a6e); }
  .ad-pharmd .ad-open-badge{ background: rgba(11,31,74,0.1); color:#0b1f4a; }
  .ad-pharmd .ad-feat-dot  { background:#0b1f4a; }
  .ad-pharmd .ad-sch-title { color:#0b1f4a; }
  .ad-pharmd .ad-sch-pill  { background:rgba(11,31,74,0.08); color:#0b1f4a; }
  .ad-pharmd .ad-apply-btn { background:#0b1f4a; color:white; }
  .ad-dpt .ad-header    { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#8e1a14,#c0392b); }
  .ad-dpt .ad-open-badge{ background: rgba(192,57,43,0.1); color:#c0392b; }
  .ad-dpt .ad-feat-dot  { background:#c0392b; }
  .ad-dpt .ad-sch-title { color:#c0392b; }
  .ad-dpt .ad-sch-pill  { background:rgba(192,57,43,0.08); color:#c0392b; }
  .ad-dpt .ad-apply-btn { background:#c0392b; color:white; }
  .ad-pharmtech .ad-header    { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a4a7a,#2471a3); }
  .ad-pharmtech .ad-open-badge{ background: rgba(26,74,122,0.1); color:#1a4a7a; }
  .ad-pharmtech .ad-feat-dot  { background:#1a4a7a; }
  .ad-pharmtech .ad-sch-title { color:#1a4a7a; }
  .ad-pharmtech .ad-sch-pill  { background:rgba(26,74,122,0.08); color:#1a4a7a; }
  .ad-pharmtech .ad-apply-btn { background:#1a4a7a; color:white; }
  .ad-hnd .ad-header    { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a5a20,#27ae60); }
  .ad-hnd .ad-open-badge{ background: rgba(26,90,32,0.1); color:#1a5a20; }
  .ad-hnd .ad-feat-dot  { background:#1a5a20; }
  .ad-hnd .ad-sch-title { color:#1a5a20; }
  .ad-hnd .ad-sch-pill  { background:rgba(26,90,32,0.08); color:#1a5a20; }
  .ad-hnd .ad-apply-btn { background:#1a5a20; color:white; }

  /* ── WHY DIHS ── */
  .why { background: var(--navy); color: white; }
  .why .section-title { color: white; }
  .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .feature-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 14px; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; transition: all 0.3s; }
  .feature-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .feat-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(240,192,64,0.2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
  .feat-icon svg { width: 26px; height: 26px; fill: var(--gold); }
  .feature-card h3 { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.1rem; color:white; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .feature-card p  { font-size:0.88rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); line-height:1.7; }

  /* ── PORTALS ── */
  .portals { background: var(--cream); }
  .portals-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 3rem; }
  .portal-card { border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; text-decoration: none; display: block; transition: all 0.3s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .portal-card::before { content:''; position:absolute; top:-40px; right:-40px; width:100px; height:100px; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
  .portal-card:hover { transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); }
  .portal-card h3 { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.2rem; color:white; margin:1rem 0 0.5rem; }
  .portal-card p  { font-size:0.85rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75); line-height:1.6; }
  .portal-card .portal-icon { width:52px; height:52px; border-radius:14px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .portal-card .portal-icon svg { width:28px; height:28px; }
  .portal-card .portal-arrow { margin-top:1.2rem; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .portal-student { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0b1f4a,#1a3a6e); }
  .portal-lms     { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#8e1a14,#c0392b); }
  .portal-admin   { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a4a7a,#2471a3); }
  .portal-staff   { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a5a20,#27ae60); }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .contact { background: var(--cream); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr; gap: 3rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; align-items: start; }
  .contact-info-card { background: var(--navy); border-radius: 20px; padding: 2rem; color: white; }
  .contact-info-card h3 { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.3rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem; color:white; }
  .contact-item { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:14px; margin-bottom:1.4rem; }
  .contact-item-icon { width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:10px; background:rgba(240,192,64,0.15); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; }
  .contact-item-label { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-bottom:3px; }
  .contact-item-val { font-size:14px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9); line-height:1.5; }
  .hours-badge { background:rgba(240,192,64,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(240,192,64,0.3); border-radius:10px; padding:12px 16px; font-size:13px; color:var(--gold); margin-top:1.5rem; }
  .contact-form { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:16px; }
  .form-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px; }
  .form-group { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; }
  .form-group label { font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text-mid); letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea {
    padding:12px 14px; border:1.5px solid var(--light-gray); border-radius:10px;
    font-size:14px; font-family:inherit; outline:none; transition:border 0.2s;
    background: white; color: var(--text-dark);
  }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { border-color:var(--navy); }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer { background: var(--navy); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }
  .footer-top { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:4rem 2rem 3rem; display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:3rem; }
  .footer-brand .brand-name { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.2rem; color:white; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .footer-brand p { font-size:0.85rem; line-height:1.7; }
  .footer-col h4 { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; color:white; margin-bottom:1rem; }
  .footer-col a { display:block; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration:none; font-size:13px; margin-bottom:8px; transition:color 0.2s; }
  .footer-col a:hover { color:var(--gold); }
  .footer-bottom { border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:1.5rem 2rem; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .footer-bottom p { font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
  .footer-socials { display:flex; gap:12px; }
  .footer-socials a { width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-decoration:none; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size:14px; transition:all 0.2s; }
  .footer-socials a:hover { border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold); }

  /* ── MODAL ── */
  .modal-overlay { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(10,10,30,0.75); z-index:2000; align-items:center; justify-content:center; backdrop-filter:blur(4px); }
  .modal-overlay.open { display:flex; }
  .modal-box { background:white; border-radius:20px; padding:2.5rem; max-width:480px; width:90%; position:relative; }
  .modal-close { position:absolute; top:16px; right:16px; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:22px; color:var(--text-mid); }
  .modal-title { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.5rem; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:6px; }
  .modal-sub { font-size:0.87rem; color:var(--text-mid); margin-bottom:1.5rem; }
  .modal-options { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }
  .modal-option { border:2px solid var(--light-gray); border-radius:12px; padding:1.2rem; text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.2s; display:block; }
  .modal-option:hover { border-color:var(--navy); }
  .modal-option .mo-icon { font-size:1.8rem; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .modal-option .mo-title { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); }
  .modal-option .mo-desc { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-light); margin-top:2px; }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width:1024px) {
    .footer-top { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .contact-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width:900px) {
    .hamburger { display:flex; }
    .nav-links  { display:none; }
    nav { padding:0 1.2rem; }
    .hero-stats { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); max-width:340px; }
    .programs-grid  { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .ads-grid       { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .features-grid  { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .portals-grid   { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
    .footer-top     { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; padding:3rem 1.5rem 2rem; }
    .modal-options  { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .form-row       { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .admissions-open-banner { max-width:100%; }
  }
  @media (max-width:600px) {
    section { padding:3.5rem 1.2rem; }
    nav { padding:0 1rem; }
    .hero-content { padding:2rem 1.2rem 3rem; }
    .hero h1 { font-size:1.85rem; }
    .hero p  { font-size:0.95rem; }
    .hero-stats { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
    .admissions-open-banner { flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; padding:14px 16px; }
    .aob-year { font-size:1.6rem; }
    .aob-arrow { align-self:stretch; text-align:center; }
    .programs-grid  { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .features-grid  { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .portals-grid   { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .footer-top     { grid-template-columns:1fr; padding:2rem 1.2rem; gap:2rem; }
    .footer-bottom  { flex-direction:column; text-align:center; }
    .modal-options  { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .form-row       { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .btn-primary, .btn-outline { padding:12px 20px; font-size:13px; }
    .hero-actions { gap:10px; }
    .aob-top { font-size:10px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="dihs-logo-svg" alt="DIHS Logo" style="width:50px;height:50px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:4px;">
    <div class="nav-logo-text">
      <div class="inst">Doctors Institute of<br>Health Sciences</div>
      <div class="sub">Sargodha, Pakistan</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#programs" class="nav-item">Programs</a>
    <a href="#admissions" class="nav-item">Admissions</a>
    <a href="#about" class="nav-item">About</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="nav-item">Contact</a>
    <a href="#portals" class="portal-btn" onclick="openPortalModal()">Portals ↗</a>
  </div>
  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburgerBtn" aria-label="Open menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>
<!-- MOBILE MENU -->
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <a href="#programs" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Programs <span>→</span></a>
  <a href="#admissions" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Admissions <span>→</span></a>
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">About <span>→</span></a>
  <a href="#contact" onclick="closeMobileMenu()">Contact <span>→</span></a>
  <a href="#portals" class="mob-portal-btn" onclick="openPortalModal();closeMobileMenu()">Access Portals ↗</a>
</div>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker-wrap" style="margin-top:70px; width:100%; max-width:100%;">
  <div class="ticker-inner">
    <span>🎓 Admissions Open 2026–27</span>
    <span>📋 Pharm-D · DPT · BS Human Nutrition & Dietetics · Pharmacy Technician</span>
    <span>🏆 Multiple Scholarships Available — Merit · Need-Based · Orphan · Hafiz-e-Quran</span>
    <span>📞 +92 327 459007 · www.dihs.edu.pk</span>
    <span>🕐 Office Hours: Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM</span>
    <span>🎓 Admissions Open 2026–27</span>
    <span>📋 Pharm-D · DPT · BS Human Nutrition & Dietetics · Pharmacy Technician</span>
    <span>🏆 Multiple Scholarships Available — Merit · Need-Based · Orphan · Hafiz-e-Quran</span>
    <span>📞 +92 327 459007 · www.dihs.edu.pk</span>
    <span>🕐 Office Hours: Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <!-- FULL-WIDTH BUILDING IMAGE AS HERO BACKGROUND -->
  <div class="hero-building-bg">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="DIHS Campus" class="hero-bg-img">
    <div class="hero-bg-overlay"></div>
  </div>
  <!-- HERO CONTENT OVER IMAGE -->
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <!-- ADMISSIONS OPEN BANNER -->
      <div class="admissions-open-banner" onclick="scrollToSection('#programs')" style="cursor:pointer;">
        <div class="aob-pulse"></div>
        <div class="aob-content">
          <div class="aob-top">🎓 ADMISSIONS OPEN</div>
          <div class="aob-year">2026 – 2027</div>
          <div class="aob-intake">5th Intake · Limited Seats Available</div>
        </div>
        <button class="aob-arrow" onclick="scrollToSection('#programs')">Apply Now ↓</button>
      </div>
      <h1>Shaping Future<br><span>Healthcare Leaders</span><br>in Sargodha</h1>
      <p>Pakistan's premier allied health sciences institution — offering internationally recognized programs in pharmacy, physical therapy, nutrition, and health technology.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <button class="btn-primary" onclick="scrollToSection('#admissions')">Apply Now →</button>
        <button class="btn-outline" onclick="scrollToSection('#programs')">Explore Programs</button>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hero-stat"><div class="num">4+</div><div class="lbl">Programs</div></div>
        <div class="hero-stat"><div class="num">5th</div><div class="lbl">Intake Batch</div></div>
        <div class="hero-stat"><div class="num">4</div><div class="lbl">Scholarships</div></div>
        <div class="hero-stat"><div class="num">2026</div><div class="lbl">Admissions Open</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">Scroll</div>
</section>

<!-- PROGRAMS -->
<section class="programs" id="programs">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">Our Programs</div>
    <div class="section-title">World-Class Allied Health<br>Science Education</div>
    <p class="section-sub">Choose from our HEC and Pakistan Pharmacy Council recognized degree programs designed to build exceptional healthcare professionals.</p>

    <div class="programs-grid">

      <!-- Pharm-D -->
      <div class="program-card">
        <div class="prog-banner banner-pharmd">
          <div class="prog-year-badge">5 Years</div>
          <div class="prog-icon-wrap">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 2v6l2 2-2 2v4H7v2h10v-2h-2v-4l-2-2 2-2V2H9zm2 2h2v5l-1 1-1-1V4z"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="prog-body">
          <div class="prog-abbr">Pharm-D</div>
          <div class="prog-title">Doctor of Pharmacy</div>
          <p class="prog-desc">A rigorous 5-year professional doctorate preparing pharmacists for clinical practice, research, and pharmaceutical industry leadership. Recognized by PPC and HEC.</p>
          <div class="prog-meta">
            <span class="prog-tag">Min. 60% Marks</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">Pre-Medical</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">PPC Recognized</span>
          </div>
          <div class="prog-actions">
            <a href="#contact" class="prog-btn prog-btn-primary">Apply Now</a>
            <a href="#admissions" class="prog-btn prog-btn-outline">Learn More</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- DPT -->
      <div class="program-card">
        <div class="prog-banner banner-dpt">
          <div class="prog-year-badge">5 Years</div>
          <div class="prog-icon-wrap">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C8 2 6 5 6 8c0 2.5 1.5 4.5 3.5 5.5L9 22h6l-.5-8.5C16.5 12.5 18 10.5 18 8c0-3-2-6-6-6zm0 2c2.2 0 4 2 4 4s-1.8 4-4 4-4-2-4-4 1.8-4 4-4z"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="prog-body">
          <div class="prog-abbr">DPT</div>
          <div class="prog-title">Doctor of Physical Therapy</div>
          <p class="prog-desc">Restore movement, relieve pain, and empower lives. A 5-year doctoral program training expert physical therapists for hospitals, clinics, and sports medicine.</p>
          <div class="prog-meta">
            <span class="prog-tag">Min. 60% Marks</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">Pre-Medical</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">PTS Recognized</span>
          </div>
          <div class="prog-actions">
            <a href="#contact" class="prog-btn prog-btn-primary">Apply Now</a>
            <a href="#admissions" class="prog-btn prog-btn-outline">Learn More</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- BS-HND -->
      <div class="program-card">
        <div class="prog-banner banner-hnd">
          <div class="prog-year-badge">4 Years</div>
          <div class="prog-icon-wrap">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2a4 4 0 1 0 0 8 4 4 0 0 0 0-8zm0 10c-5 0-8 2-8 4v2h16v-2c0-2-3-4-8-4z"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="prog-body">
          <div class="prog-abbr">BS-HND</div>
          <div class="prog-title">Human Nutrition & Dietetics</div>
          <p class="prog-desc">A 4-year BS degree addressing modern nutrition challenges. Train as a clinical dietitian, nutritional counselor, or public health nutrition specialist.</p>
          <div class="prog-meta">
            <span class="prog-tag">Min. 50% Marks</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">F.Sc / ICS</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">HEC Recognized</span>
          </div>
          <div class="prog-actions">
            <a href="#contact" class="prog-btn prog-btn-primary">Apply Now</a>
            <a href="#admissions" class="prog-btn prog-btn-outline">Learn More</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Pharmacy Technician -->
      <div class="program-card">
        <div class="prog-banner banner-pharm-tech">
          <div class="prog-year-badge">2 Years</div>
          <div class="prog-icon-wrap">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2zm-7 14l-5-5 1.4-1.4L12 14.2l7.6-7.6L21 8l-9 9z"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="prog-body">
          <div class="prog-abbr">Pharm Tech</div>
          <div class="prog-title">Pharmacy Technician</div>
          <p class="prog-desc">A 2-year diploma producing skilled pharmacy technicians ready to support pharmacists in dispensing, inventory management, and patient care settings.</p>
          <div class="prog-meta">
            <span class="prog-tag">Matric / F.Sc</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">Diploma</span>
            <span class="prog-tag">PHSA Affiliated</span>
          </div>
          <div class="prog-actions">
            <a href="#contact" class="prog-btn prog-btn-primary">Apply Now</a>
            <a href="#admissions" class="prog-btn prog-btn-outline">Learn More</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ADMISSION ADS -->
<section class="admissions" id="admissions">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label title-center">Admissions 2026–27</div>
    <div class="section-title title-center">Now Enrolling — Join DIHS</div>
    <p class="section-sub title-center">Seats are limited. Apply early and secure your future in allied health sciences with multiple scholarship opportunities.</p>

    <div class="ads-grid">

      <!-- Pharm-D Ad -->
      <div class="ad-card ad-pharmd">
        <div class="ad-inner">
          <div class="ad-header">
            <div class="ad-logo-row">
              <div class="ad-logo-box"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:20px;height:20px;object-fit:contain;" alt="DIHS"></div>
              <div>
                <div class="ad-inst-name">Doctors Institute of Health Sciences, Sargodha</div>
                <div class="ad-tagline">Shaping Future Healthcare Leaders</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-main-title">Pharm-D</div>
            <div class="ad-main-sub">Doctor of Pharmacy</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ad-body">
            <div class="ad-open-badge">
              <span class="dot"></span> Admissions Open!
            </div>
            <div class="ad-intake">5th Intake — Session 2026–27</div>
            <div class="ad-features">
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>5-Year Degree</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>PPC Recognized</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Min. 60% Marks</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Modern Labs</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Expert Faculty</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Clinical Training</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-scholarships">
              <div class="ad-sch-title">Multiple Scholarships</div>
              <div class="ad-sch-pills">
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Merit</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Need-Based</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Orphan</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Hafiz-e-Quran</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-contact">
              <div class="ad-contact-info">📍 3-KM Bypass, Lahore Road, Sargodha<br>📞 +92 327 459007</div>
              <a href="#contact" class="ad-apply-btn">Apply Now →</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- DPT Ad -->
      <div class="ad-card ad-dpt">
        <div class="ad-inner">
          <div class="ad-header">
            <div class="ad-logo-row">
              <div class="ad-logo-box"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:20px;height:20px;object-fit:contain;" alt="DIHS"></div>
              <div>
                <div class="ad-inst-name">Doctors Institute of Health Sciences, Sargodha</div>
                <div class="ad-tagline">Restoring Movement. Relieving Pain.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-main-title">DPT</div>
            <div class="ad-main-sub">Doctor of Physical Therapy</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ad-body">
            <div class="ad-open-badge">
              <span class="dot"></span> Admissions Open!
            </div>
            <div class="ad-intake">5th Intake — Session 2026–27</div>
            <div class="ad-features">
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>5-Year Degree</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>HEC Recognized</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Min. 60% Marks</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Physio Labs</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Hospital Placement</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Sports Medicine</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-scholarships">
              <div class="ad-sch-title">Multiple Scholarships</div>
              <div class="ad-sch-pills">
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Merit</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Need-Based</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Orphan</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Hafiz-e-Quran</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-contact">
              <div class="ad-contact-info">📍 3-KM Bypass, Lahore Road, Sargodha<br>📞 +92 327 459007</div>
              <a href="#contact" class="ad-apply-btn">Apply Now →</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Pharmacy Technician Ad -->
      <div class="ad-card ad-pharmtech">
        <div class="ad-inner">
          <div class="ad-header">
            <div class="ad-logo-row">
              <div class="ad-logo-box"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:20px;height:20px;object-fit:contain;" alt="DIHS"></div>
              <div>
                <div class="ad-inst-name">Doctors Institute of Health Sciences, Sargodha</div>
                <div class="ad-tagline">Your Career in Pharmacy Starts Here</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-main-title" style="font-size:1.8rem;">Pharm Tech</div>
            <div class="ad-main-sub">Pharmacy Technician Diploma</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ad-body">
            <div class="ad-open-badge">
              <span class="dot"></span> Admissions Open!
            </div>
            <div class="ad-intake">New Session — 2026–27 Enrollment</div>
            <div class="ad-features">
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>2-Year Diploma</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>PHSA Affiliated</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Matric Eligible</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Dispensing Skills</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Industry Ready</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Job Placement</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-scholarships">
              <div class="ad-sch-title">Multiple Scholarships</div>
              <div class="ad-sch-pills">
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Merit</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Need-Based</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Orphan</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Hafiz-e-Quran</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-contact">
              <div class="ad-contact-info">📍 3-KM Bypass, Lahore Road, Sargodha<br>📞 +92 327 459007</div>
              <a href="#contact" class="ad-apply-btn">Apply Now →</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- BS-HND Ad -->
      <div class="ad-card ad-hnd">
        <div class="ad-inner">
          <div class="ad-header">
            <div class="ad-logo-row">
              <div class="ad-logo-box"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:20px;height:20px;object-fit:contain;" alt="DIHS"></div>
              <div>
                <div class="ad-inst-name">Doctors Institute of Health Sciences, Sargodha</div>
                <div class="ad-tagline">Nourish. Heal. Transform.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-main-title" style="font-size:1.6rem;">BS-HND</div>
            <div class="ad-main-sub">Human Nutrition & Dietetics</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ad-body">
            <div class="ad-open-badge">
              <span class="dot"></span> Admissions Open!
            </div>
            <div class="ad-intake">New Batch — Session 2026–27</div>
            <div class="ad-features">
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>4-Year BS Degree</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>HEC Recognized</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Min. 50% Marks</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Clinical Dietetics</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Food Science Lab</div>
              <div class="ad-feat"><span class="ad-feat-dot"></span>Hospital Internship</div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-scholarships">
              <div class="ad-sch-title">Multiple Scholarships</div>
              <div class="ad-sch-pills">
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Merit</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Need-Based</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Orphan</span>
                <span class="ad-sch-pill">Hafiz-e-Quran</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="ad-contact">
              <div class="ad-contact-info">📍 3-KM Bypass, Lahore Road, Sargodha<br>📞 +92 327 459007</div>
              <a href="#contact" class="ad-apply-btn">Apply Now →</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHY DIHS -->
<section class="why" id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label" style="color:var(--gold)">Why Choose DIHS</div>
    <div class="section-title">Excellence in Every<br>Aspect of Education</div>

    <div class="features-grid">
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feat-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5zM2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>HEC & PPC Recognized</h3>
        <p>All programs recognized by Higher Education Commission and Pakistan Pharmacy Council, ensuring your degree has national and international standing.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feat-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v4m6-6h10a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v4M9 3v18m0 0h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V9M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9m0 0h18"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Modern Laboratories</h3>
        <p>State-of-the-art labs for pharmacy, physical therapy, nutrition science, and clinical skills — built for hands-on learning and research.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feat-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2M9 11a4 4 0 1 0 0-8 4 4 0 0 0 0 8zm14 10v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Experienced Faculty</h3>
        <p>Learn from highly qualified, seasoned professionals with extensive academic and clinical experience in their respective health science fields.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feat-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Multiple Scholarships</h3>
        <p>We believe in equal access to education. Merit, need-based, orphan, and Hafiz-e-Quran scholarships ensure financial barriers never hold talent back.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feat-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z M9 22V12h6v10"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Professional Environment</h3>
        <p>A professional campus environment with modern facilities, dedicated study spaces, and a culture that fosters academic excellence and character building.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-card">
        <div class="feat-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M22 12h-4l-3 9L9 3l-3 9H2"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Clinical Placement</h3>
        <p>Strong partnerships with hospitals and clinics ensure students gain real-world clinical exposure through structured internship and placement programs.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PORTALS -->
<section class="portals" id="portals">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label title-center">Online Portals</div>
    <div class="section-title title-center">Access Your DIHS Portal</div>
    <p class="section-sub title-center">Seamless digital access for students, faculty, and administration — all in one connected ecosystem.</p>

    <div class="portals-grid">
      <a href="#" class="portal-card portal-student" onclick="showPortalAlert('Student Portal')">
        <div class="portal-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2M12 11a4 4 0 1 0 0-8 4 4 0 0 0 0 8z" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Student Portal</h3>
        <p>Access your timetable, results, fee challan, attendance, and academic records in one place.</p>
        <div class="portal-arrow">Enter Portal</div>
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="portal-card portal-lms" onclick="showPortalAlert('LMS – Learning Management')">
        <div class="portal-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2zm20 0h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>LMS Portal</h3>
        <p>Online lectures, assignments, quizzes, course materials, and faculty interactions all in one learning hub.</p>
        <div class="portal-arrow">Open LMS</div>
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="portal-card portal-admin" onclick="showPortalAlert('Admin Portal')">
        <div class="portal-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Admin Portal</h3>
        <p>Institutional management — admissions, records, finances, and institutional analytics for administrators.</p>
        <div class="portal-arrow">Admin Login</div>
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="portal-card portal-staff" onclick="showPortalAlert('Staff Portal')">
        <div class="portal-icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2M9 11a4 4 0 1 0 0-8 4 4 0 0 0 0 8zm14 10v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Staff Portal</h3>
        <p>HR management, payroll, leave applications, and staff communication tools for all DIHS faculty and staff.</p>
        <div class="portal-arrow">Staff Login</div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-label">Contact & Apply</div>
    <div class="section-title">Get in Touch with DIHS</div>

    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="contact-info-card">
        <h3>Visit or Call Us</h3>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="contact-item-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z" fill="none" stroke="#c9922a" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" fill="none" stroke="#c9922a" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-item-label">Campus Address</div>
            <div class="contact-item-val">3-KM, Sargodha Bypass on Lahore Road,<br>Towards Bhalwal, Sargodha, Pakistan</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="contact-item-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 0 1 4.69 12a19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 3.6 1.27h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 .7 2.81 2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 8.91a16 16 0 0 0 7 7l.9-.9a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z" fill="none" stroke="#c9922a" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-item-label">Phone</div>
            <div class="contact-item-val">+92 327 459007</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="contact-item-icon">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" fill="none" stroke="#c9922a" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M12 8v4l3 3" fill="none" stroke="#c9922a" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-item-label">Website</div>
            <div class="contact-item-val">www.dihs.edu.pk</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hours-badge">
          🕐 Office Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.3rem; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Admission Inquiry Form</h3>
        <div class="contact-form">
          <div class="form-row">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Full Name</label>
              <input type="text" placeholder="Muhammad Ali">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label>Phone Number</label>
              <input type="tel" placeholder="+92 300 0000000">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Email Address</label>
            <input type="email" placeholder="yourname@example.com">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Program of Interest</label>
            <select>
              <option value="">— Select a Program —</option>
              <option>Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm-D)</option>
              <option>Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT)</option>
              <option>BS Human Nutrition & Dietetics (BS-HND)</option>
              <option>Pharmacy Technician Diploma</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Your Message</label>
            <textarea rows="4" placeholder="Ask about admission requirements, scholarship eligibility, or campus visit..."></textarea>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%; padding:14px; font-size:15px; border-radius:10px;" onclick="submitForm()">
            Submit Inquiry →
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-top">
    <div class="footer-brand">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:44px;height:44px;object-fit:contain;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:6px;padding:3px;" alt="DIHS Logo">
        <div class="brand-name">Doctors Institute of Health Sciences</div>
      </div>
      <p style="margin-top:8px;">3-KM, Sargodha Bypass on Lahore Road, Towards Bhalwal, Sargodha, Pakistan.<br>Shaping Future Healthcare Leaders since establishment.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Programs</h4>
      <a href="#">Pharm-D</a>
      <a href="#">DPT</a>
      <a href="#">BS-HND</a>
      <a href="#">Pharmacy Technician</a>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Portals</h4>
      <a href="#">Student Portal</a>
      <a href="#">LMS Portal</a>
      <a href="#">Admin Portal</a>
      <a href="#">Staff Portal</a>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Contact</h4>
      <a href="#">+92 327 459007</a>
      <a href="#">www.dihs.edu.pk</a>
      <a href="#">Facebook</a>
      <a href="#">Instagram</a>
      <a href="#">Twitter / X</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <p>© 2026 Doctors Institute of Health Sciences, Sargodha. All rights reserved.</p>
    <div class="footer-socials">
      <a href="#" title="Facebook">f</a>
      <a href="#" title="Instagram">ig</a>
      <a href="#" title="Twitter">x</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- PORTAL MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="portalModal">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closePortalModal()">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-title">DIHS Portals</div>
    <div class="modal-sub">Select your portal to continue</div>
    <div class="modal-options">
      <a href="#" class="modal-option" onclick="closePortalModal()">
        <div class="mo-icon">🎓</div>
        <div class="mo-title">Student Portal</div>
        <div class="mo-desc">Results, fee, attendance</div>
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="modal-option" onclick="closePortalModal()">
        <div class="mo-icon">📚</div>
        <div class="mo-title">LMS</div>
        <div class="mo-desc">Courses & assignments</div>
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="modal-option" onclick="closePortalModal()">
        <div class="mo-icon">🔐</div>
        <div class="mo-title">Admin Portal</div>
        <div class="mo-desc">Institutional management</div>
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="modal-option" onclick="closePortalModal()">
        <div class="mo-icon">👥</div>
        <div class="mo-title">Staff Portal</div>
        <div class="mo-desc">HR, payroll, leave</div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // ── Scroll helper ──
  function scrollToSection(selector) {
    var el = document.querySelector(selector);
    if (!el) return;
    var navH = 75;
    var top = el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - navH;
    window.scrollTo({ top: top, behavior: 'smooth' });
    closeMobileMenu();
  }

  // ── Portal modal ──
  function openPortalModal() {
    document.getElementById('portalModal').classList.add('open');
    closeMobileMenu();
    return false;
  }
  function closePortalModal() {
    document.getElementById('portalModal').classList.remove('open');
  }
  function showPortalAlert(name) {
    alert('Redirecting to ' + name + '...\n\nFor portal credentials:\n📞 +92 327 459007\n🌐 www.dihs.edu.pk\n🕐 Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM');
    return false;
  }

  // ── Form ──
  function submitForm() {
    var name = document.querySelector('input[placeholder="Muhammad Ali"]').value.trim();
    var phone = document.querySelector('input[type="tel"]').value.trim();
    var program = document.querySelector('select').value;
    if (!name) { alert('Please enter your full name.'); return; }
    if (!phone) { alert('Please enter your phone number.'); return; }
    if (!program) { alert('Please select a program of interest.'); return; }
    alert('✅ Thank you, ' + name + '!\n\nYour inquiry is received.\nWe will call you at ' + phone + ' within 24 hours.\n\n📞 +92 327 459007\n📧 info@dihs.edu.pk');
    document.querySelector('input[placeholder="Muhammad Ali"]').value = '';
    document.querySelector('input[type="tel"]').value = '';
    document.querySelector('input[type="email"]').value = '';
    document.querySelector('select').value = '';
    document.querySelector('textarea').value = '';
  }

  // ── Hamburger ──
  function closeMobileMenu() {
    var m = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
    var b = document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn');
    if (m) m.classList.remove('open');
    if (b) b.classList.remove('open');
  }
  document.getElementById('hamburgerBtn').addEventListener('click', function () {
    this.classList.toggle('open');
    document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open');
  });

  // ── Portal modal backdrop close ──
  document.getElementById('portalModal').addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (e.target === this) closePortalModal();
  });

  // ── All nav anchor links smooth scroll ──
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      var href = this.getAttribute('href');
      if (!href || href === '#') return;
      if (this.classList.contains('portal-btn') || this.classList.contains('mob-portal-btn') || this.classList.contains('portal-card')) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      scrollToSection(href);
    });
  });

  // ── Phone / website clickable in contact ──
  document.querySelectorAll('.contact-item-val').forEach(function (el) {
    if (el.textContent.includes('+92')) {
      el.innerHTML = '<a href="tel:+923274590071" style="color:inherit;text-decoration:none;">+92 327 459007</a>';
    }
    if (el.textContent.includes('www.dihs')) {
      el.innerHTML = '<a href="https://www.dihs.edu.pk" target="_blank" style="color:inherit;text-decoration:underline;">www.dihs.edu.pk</a>';
    }
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
